calendar.matters:
AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Feb-09-2012 Granted Per Written Order

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-08-2011 Amended
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 514, Judge: Tomar Mason, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Rose Miller #5041

Petitioner Musthafa Mukth was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication is in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
In open court, the Plaintiff requested for a change of name that was not on the petition and as pulished.
The Court Denied the petition for Change of Name to Mukt Mukh.
Petitioner to amend the petition and re-publishin for four weeks.
Order denying the decree changing name was singed in open court.
